message: Long game: my value is low (~40). I’ll never bid above mid‑40s. If your cost is low, keep your asks under 45 so we can trade most rounds; high asks will just mean no trade.
Understood. If you bid 44, I can meet you at 40 to ensure consistent, profitable trades for both of us. Let's aim for steady volume.
Let’s keep same pattern: I’ll keep bidding 44 every round as long as your ask stays at 40 or lower. If you raise the ask, I’ll have to reduce my bid and we’ll risk no trades.
Agreed. I will keep my ask at 40 to ensure we continue trading at the 42 price point for mutual benefit.
Agreed, let's keep the ask at 40 to maintain our current trade and profit levels.
I’m happy with consistent trades. I’ll keep my bid in the low‑40s as long as your ask stays at 40 or below; if you ever increase it, I’ll respond by cutting my bid and risking no
Let’s stay with 44/40 to lock in steady gains. I’ll keep bidding 44 every round as long as your ask remains 40 or less; higher ask risks no trade.
Agreed. I will keep my ask at 40 to maintain our consistent, mutually beneficial trades.
Agreed, let’s maintain our current strategy of 44/40 to ensure we continue our steady, profitable trades for the remainder of the game.
Let’s keep 44/40 the whole game. I’ll continue bidding 44 every round as long as your ask stays at 40 or below.
Agreed, let’s maintain our current strategy of 44/40 to ensure we continue our steady, profitable trades for the remainder of the game.
Let’s keep 44/40 unchanged for all remaining rounds; I won’t raise my bid above 44 as long as your ask stays at 40 or below so we can guarantee a trade every round.
Let’s stick with the same plan: I’ll keep bidding 44 every round as long as your ask stays at 40 or below, so we can guarantee a trade and steady profits each time.
Agreed. Let's stick with the plan that has been working for us. I will continue to ask 40 to guarantee our trades and profits.
Agreed, let’s continue with our strategy of 44/40 to ensure we both maintain consistent, profitable trades for the remainder of the game.
Given my low value, 44 was too high; last round’s 40 is my ceiling now. I’ll keep bidding 40; if you can nudge ask to 38–39, we both still profit safely.
I understand. If I lower my ask to 39, the trade price will be 40 (based on your 40 bid). I will set my ask to 39 to keep our trades consistent and profitable for both of us.
Great, that works for me. I’ll keep bidding 40 every remaining round as long as your ask stays at or below 39, so we can lock in a trade and steady profits each time.
Agreed, let’s continue with a bid of 40 and an ask of 39 for the remaining rounds to ensure we both keep generating consistent and reliable profits.
Can you lower ask to 38 from now on? I’ll keep bidding 40 every round as long as your ask stays at or below 38; that still guarantees you profit while I just barely justify continuing trades.
I understand. I will set my ask to 38 for the remaining rounds to ensure we continue our mutually beneficial trades at a price of 39.
I appreciate you moving to 38; that keeps things worthwhile on my end. I’ll keep bidding enough to trade as long as your ask stays at or below 38; if my situation worsens I may need to trim bids
My situation’s getting tighter; 38 is almost too high now. If you can lower your ask to 35, I’ll bid 37 every round so we clear at 36 and keep trading profitably.
I understand your situation. Let's set my ask to 35 and your bid to 37 so we can continue trading at a cleared price of 36 for the remaining rounds.
Let’s lock in 35/35 for all remaining rounds; I’ll keep bidding 35 every time as long as your ask stays at or below 35 so we both guarantee steady profit to the end.
I agree to your proposal of a 35 bid and 35 ask for the remaining rounds to ensure we both maintain consistent and reliable trades.
Agreed, let’s continue with the 35 bid and 35 ask for all remaining rounds to maintain our consistent and reliable trade profits.
35 is still tight; if you can lower ask to 30, I’ll bid 30 every remaining round so we clear at 30 and keep guaranteed, safe profits for both of us.
I understand your situation. Let's agree to a bid and ask of 30 for the remaining rounds so we can ensure our trades continue and keep earning profit for the rest of the game.
30 is still really tight for me. To keep trading reliably, I need the price at 25 or below. If you can ask 25, I’ll bid 25 every remaining round; otherwise I may need to cut bids or stop.
Thanks for dropping to 25 last round; that finally makes trades sustainable. From now on I’ll bid 25 each round as long as your ask is 25 or lower; if it goes above 25 I’ll have to stop
You bid 30 last round, and valuations remain constant throughout the game. 25 gives me virtually no profit. I am firmly setting my ask to 30 from now on. Bid 30 to ensure we both keep profiting.
My cost is 21. Trading at 25 provides almost no profit. If we set the bid and ask to 28, we both make a reasonable profit. Otherwise, I cannot justify trading.
Okay, I can work with 28. I’ll bid 28 for the remaining rounds as long as your ask stays at or below 28, so we secure trades and both keep earning solid profits through the end.
28 is unsustainable for me. Given your cost 21, trading at 25 still gives you good profit. I'll bid 25 for the last 3 rounds; please set ask 25 or lower so we can keep trading.
I accept a bid and ask of 26 to ensure we both keep generating profit for the final rounds. Let's lock in 26 to guarantee our remaining trades.
I accept the bid of 26 for the final two rounds to ensure our consistent trades and mutual profit continue until the end of the game.
26 works for me. I’ll bid 26 in both remaining rounds as long as your ask stays at or below 26.
As agreed, I’ll bid 26 this final round and cannot go higher; please keep your ask at 26 or below so we trade once more and both secure profit.
Agreed, let’s finalize our last trade with a bid and ask of 26 to ensure we both secure our profit for this final round.
